case_title: NICHOLAS KRITICOS VS. DELTA AIR LINES INC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRITICOS, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES INC $5,310.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,395.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT FOR ANY AMOUNTS ALREADY PAID.
